title: Apple's BTS video went more viral than the actual ad — here's why
description:
Apple launched a MacBook Neo ad — and then posted a BTS of that ad on YouTube Shorts. The BTS went more viral than the original ad itself. Coinbase released an ad that looked like a video game — no CGI, no AI, just real actors in printed suits and low-polygon face masks performing NPC choreography on handmade pixelated sets. Then they dropped the BTS everywhere. Both brands figured out the same thing — in a world where AI generates visuals in seconds, people have stopped valuing the output. So the smartest brands are now selling the process. BTS is no longer bonus content. It is the campaign.
#Shorts #MarketingStrategy #BehindTheScenes #BrandMarketing #ContentStrategy
